steps.title: Check whether the lines are parallel
steps.content: The equations represent two straight lines. Line 1: $y = x + 24$ has slope 1. Line 2: $y = 7x$ has slope 7. Since the slopes are different, the lines are not parallel and must intersect.

steps.title: Solve for the intersection point
steps.content:
Set the equations equal to find where they meet:
$$x + 24 = 7x$$
Subtract $x$ from both sides:
$$24 = 6x$$
Divide by 6:
$$x = 4$$
We found exactly one value of $x$, so the graphs intersect at exactly one point. That matches choice B — B is correct.
